title: Phase 1 – System Registration Schema
description: Validates the payload for registering an AI system and initiating an audit run.

system_id.description: Unique identifier for the AI system being audited

system_name.description: Human-readable name of the AI system

system_version.description: Semantic version of the system (semver format)

vendor.description: Organization that develops or deploys the system

deployment_environment.description: Environment where the system is deployed

data_lineage.description: Description of data sources, transformations, and flows

sources.description: Data sources used by the system

jurisdictions.description: Jurisdictions under which the system falls for regulatory compliance

requested_by.description: Email address of the person requesting the audit
